rationale: Deletes one of two duplicate headers blocks from artifacts/awdp-site/vercel.json (lines 9-40 in the original), the malformed block where rewrite entries had been mixed into the headers array, a comma was missing, and the headers key was duplicated. The remaining headers block (line 41+ in the original, preserved after the deletion) is the clean one, so the file becomes valid JSON. The PR body accurately describes the corruption introduced by a bad merge from PR #124. Closed-without-merge in negatives/, but the diff itself is a correct surgical removal; rejection was likely because the sibling PR #125 was preferred or this branch was superseded.
